sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n103502" key="tetra/poros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τετρά-πορος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n103502.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with four passages</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">openings</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἁψῖδες</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9</biblScope></bibl></cit>. <pb n="1782" TEIform="pb"/> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">696</biblScope></bibl>. </sense> <sense n="II" id="n103502.1" level="2" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">coming four ways</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἄνεμοι</foreign> ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">656</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
